title: Zero Whitelist
description: Offline server whitelist system that uses player names instead of UUIDs.Suitable for the Neoforge loader.
body:
# 📝Introduction
This is a simple white-list management tool designed for NeoForge servers. It aims to help you easily control server access through easy-to-use commands.


# 🌟Features
• 🔐Name-based management：Unlike traditional UUID-based white-list systems,Zero Whitelist uses player names as the unique identifier for the white-.list This allows you to easily remember and manage player access without worrying about complex UUID encoding issues.

• `/zerowhitelist`can be abbreviated as`/zwl`.

• `/zwl add <player name>`:Adds a player to the white-list.

• `/zwl remove <player name>`:Removes a player from the white-list.

• `/zwl list`:Lists all players currently on the white-list.

• `/zwl reload`:Reloads the white-list configuration.

• `/zwl on`:Enables the white-list.

• `/zwl off`:Disables the white-list.


• 🚀**Offline server support**:Zero Whitelist works even when the server is offline.

•📋 Easy installation and configuration:Just place the mod file in the server's mods directory,and it will run quickly.The white-list file,will be created in the server's root directory.

```
zero_whitelist.json
```

 ## 📢 Note
Player names are case-sensitive.When adding or removing a player from the white-list,ensure the name entered exactly matches the name used in-game.
